---
title: CAELinux
date: 2019-05-29
categories: [CAE, devOps, computing]
tags: [caelinux, linux, cae, open-source-tools]
---
If you haven't seen CAELinux, then I highly recommend it. There is a lot of CAE software available in a single Ubuntu Linux based distro.
 
 <https://caelinux.com/CMS3/>
 
 {{< video  ScreenShots2011b.mp4 >}}
